summary: Placeholder review lane added during generation-system hardening. The senolytics track and cellular-senescence mapping are plausible, but the full set of cross-hallmark mappings has not been independently reviewed.

findings.claim_or_issue: Coverage-repair records include cellular senescence, chronic inflammation, and related endpoint mappings that have not all had independent taxonomy review.
findings.why_it_matters: Track and hallmark mappings drive downstream evidence maps and filters; weak mappings can make consumers overinterpret heterogeneous records as one synthesis group.
findings.recommended_action: Review each finding, outcome, and result against the senolytics track definition and hallmark taxonomy before promotion.
